name: Harbor Rumors
description: What the dockhands are whispering about this week. Roll when the party asks around the harbor district.

results.description: A ship came in last night flying no flag, and the harbormaster signed it in without a word.
The bell under the old pier tolled twice at midnight. Nobody has dived to look.
Customs seized a crate that screamed when they moved it. It is still in the customs house.
Three crews refused the same charter this week. Good coin, too. Nobody says why.
A fence called Grimtooth is paying double for anything pulled out of the bay.
The lighthouse keeper has not been seen in a tenday, but the light still burns every night.
